examples: Your necktie doesn't match your suit at all.
He even wore a necktie, a bright bit of ribbon.
There is a necktie, comparable fabric, comparable pattern.
Certainly his look has changed: instead of the scarf there is a patterned necktie.
Jean Dujardin (also sporting a beard) looked dapper in his black suit, forgoing the bow tie for a black silk necktie.
